title: Morcilla Biryani
description: A savory twist on traditional Biryani, featuring spicy Spanish morcilla sausage and aromatic Indian spices.
instructions: Heat oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add cumin seeds and let them sizzle for 1-2 seconds.
Add chopped onion and sauté until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add minced garlic and grated ginger; sauté for another minute.
Add morcilla sausage and cook until browned, breaking it up with a spoon as it cooks.
Add basmati rice, coriander powder, turmeric powder, red chili powder, and salt.
Stir to combine and cook for 1-2 minutes.
Add 2 cups of water to the saucepan and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 18-20 minutes or until the rice is cooked and the liquid has been absorbed.
Fluff the biryani with a fork and serve hot with double-layered Indian flatbread.
